faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about traveling with CeylonVoy

customize.question: Can tours be customized?
customize.answer: Absolutely. Every itinerary we create is built from scratch around your travel dates, interests, group size, and budget. No two CeylonVoy journeys are the same.

transfers.question: Are airport transfers included?
transfers.answer: Yes. All our tour packages include private airport transfers in comfortable, air-conditioned vehicles.

hotels.question: Can you arrange hotels?
hotels.answer: Yes. We offer a Tour + Accommodation package where we curate and book hotels that match your style and budget — from boutique properties to luxury resorts.

halal.question: Is halal food available throughout the tour?
halal.answer: Sri Lanka has a significant Muslim community, and halal food is widely available. We specifically plan meal stops and restaurant recommendations with halal options in mind.

arabicGuides.question: Are Arabic-speaking guides available?
arabicGuides.answer: Yes, we can arrange Arabic-speaking guides for your tour. Please mention this in your quotation request.

howToBook.question: How do I request a quotation?
howToBook.answer: Simply fill out our Plan Your Journey form with your travel details and preferences. Our team will respond with a personalized proposal within 24–48 hours.

cta.title: Ready to Discover Sri Lanka?
cta.subtitle: Let us craft your perfect journey. Contact us today for a personalized quotation.

footer.tagline: Premium Sri Lanka experiences tailored for the discerning traveler.
